Graydon here. In my ongoing effort to convince WITI readers that this is the most exciting moment in jazz in over 40 years, I have a few recently released albums that I want to recommend. 
Why is this interesting?
Collectively, they showcase the current breadth of the genre and the quality of the talent at its forefront...
